description: Locate the Person record for 'Marcus PII-Holder' in ArkCase based on the privacy request details at '~/Documents/privacy_request.txt'. Anonymize the record by changing the First Name to 'Redacted', changing the Last Name to 'User-[ID]' (where [ID] is the system Person ID) or 'User-Anonymized', and clearing the 'Email' and 'Business Phone' fields. Save all changes to the record.
